Days to departure

--
This board is static. The date math runs in the browser, and the rest can be replaced later by a small JSON feed.

Today Handles

Departure basics
Passport, cards, insurance, and emergency access.
ops
One filming loop
Record what happened, what changed, and why it matters.
video
One app observation
Turn a travel friction into a small product note.
apps
One workshop opening
Find a person, place, or problem where AI can help simply.
people

Operating Axes

Video
Turn travel records into memory, not just footage.
daily scene
Apps
Let field friction become copy, flow, or a feature.
product note
Workshops
Help people with small AI workflows while moving.
human loop

Pre-launch
Freeze the daily capture shape before the trip starts.
now

calibrate
